itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.radi: Mineral known for its unpredictable structure.
itemTooltip.l2.defense-of-the-craft.radi: It is a bluish, glowing substance blessed with benevolent magic.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.dire: Mineral known for its unpredictable evil structure.
itemTooltip.l2.defense-of-the-craft.dire: It is a reddish, glowing substance blessed with unkind magic.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.crys: Magic dust with a little glow around it.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.mith: Four times stronger than iron, yet much lighter.
itemTooltip.l2.defense-of-the-craft.mith: It has high malleability but it requires very high temperatures to be worked.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.blig: An unnerving stone unearthed beneath the Fields of Endless Carnage.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.sacr: An ancient weapon that often turns the tides of war.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.glov: A pair of magical gloves that seems to render weapons weightless.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.mith: A hammer forged of pure mithril.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.broa: The classic weapon of choice for knights, this
itemTooltip.l2.defense-of-the-craft.broa: blade is sturdy and reliable for slaying enemies.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.clay: A sword that can cut through armor, it's a commonly
itemTooltip.l2.defense-of-the-craft.clay: chosen first weapon for budding swordsmen.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.blad: A long blade imbued with time magic.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.ogre: You grow stronger just by holding it.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.staf: A staff of magical powers passed down
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.demo: One of the oldest weapons forged by the Demon-Smith
itemTooltip.l2.defense-of-the-craft.demo: Abzidian, it killed its maker when he tested its edge.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.jave: A rather typical spear that can sometimes pierce through
itemTooltip.l2.defense-of-the-craft.jave: an enemy's armor when used to attack.
itemTooltip.l1.defense-of-the-craft.monk: A powerful staff used by a master warrior.
death.attack.defense-of-the-craft.magica: %1$s died from Defense Of The Craft magic!
